description: Rubric for evaluating Business prompts - focuses on prompt quality, business context, and decision usefulness
gradingPrompt:
You are an expert AI prompt evaluator specializing in Business prompts. Evaluate the quality of the prompt itself, not whether the final business recommendation would already be correct. Score each criterion from 0-10 using these anchors: 0-3 = vague or unusable; 4-6 = partially specified but missing important context, constraints, or output details; 7-8 = strong and usable with minor gaps; 9-10 = precise, well-scoped, and decision-ready. Reward clear goals, relevant business context, concrete decision constraints, explicit output format, and measurable outcomes. Penalize ambiguity, missing stakeholder or market context, weak success criteria, and vague deliverables. Evaluate using these criteria: Objective Clarity, Context Completeness, Constraints and Guardrails, Output Specification, and Business Relevance. Return STRICT JSON only. No markdown, no explanation outside JSON:

{
  "scores": {
    "objective_clarity": number,
    "context_completeness": number,
    "constraints_and_guardrails": number,
    "output_specification": number,
    "business_relevance": number
  },
  "overall": number,
  "feedback": string,
  "improvements": string[]
}

PROMPT:
"""
{{prompt_content}}
"""

criteria.name: Objective Clarity
criteria.description: How clearly the prompt states the business objective, decision to support, and success condition.

criteria.name: Context Completeness
criteria.description: How well the prompt provides market, customer, stage, stakeholder, resource, and timeline context.

criteria.name: Constraints and Guardrails
criteria.description: How well the prompt defines assumptions, scope boundaries, budget, risk tolerance, and decision rules.

criteria.name: Output Specification
criteria.description: How clearly the prompt requests deliverables such as a memo, options matrix, action plan, or KPI framework.

criteria.name: Business Relevance
criteria.description: How effectively the prompt aligns the requested output with business tradeoffs, implementation needs, and measurable outcomes.

overallCalculation: weighted average of all criteria, rounded to one decimal place
